title: bolbitis auriculata
intro: Bolbitis auriculata is a species of fern, specifically a type of water fern or creeping fern, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bolbitis auriculata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Bolbitis auriculata can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions.
